agenda.agenda_title: Gabrielle Ricci and DD&T LT Visit
agenda.theme: Leadership alignment, ICC overview, capability showcase, and strategic dialogue
assumptions: Visit is planned as a 3-day executive visit based on catalog default.
Gabrielle Ricci is the primary visitor and is included in all visitor-facing sessions.
DD&T LT refers to the Data & AI leadership team and is the main internal audience for leadership sessions.
missing_information: Exact visit dates not provided; agenda is date-agnostic.
Any specific DD&T LT attendees beyond the leadership team are not listed.
open_questions: What are the exact visit dates for Day 1-3?
Should Gabrielle Ricci attend all sessions or only leadership-facing blocks?
Are there any must-include business areas or projects for the DD&T LT visit?
Do you want an offsite dinner or employee townhall included?

days.day_title: DD&T Leaders Interaction with Local Talent

sessions.description: Reception at ICC India with welcome support, access coordination, and initial site orientation. Helps leaders settle in before the Day 1 engagements begin.
sessions.attendees: Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, RK, Malti, Julie and Tom

sessions.agenda_topic: Gabriele Ricci’s connect with ICC LT
sessions.description: Leadership connect with the ICC Leadership Team to discuss priorities, local capabilities, and opportunities for deeper alignment. Focused on relationship-building and strategic context.
sessions.attendees: Gabriele Ricci, Tilak, ICC LT

sessions.description: Culture and Values Group lunch with Gabriele Ricci, CVG members, Amanda, and Sanjay. Creates space for informal engagement around culture, values, and local community.
sessions.attendees: Gabriele Ricci, CVG, Amanda, Sanjay

sessions.agenda_topic: Malti, Tom & Julie’s Lunch with ICC India Employees
sessions.description: Lunch interaction for Malti, Tom, and Julie with ICC India employees. Provides an informal setting to connect with local teams and understand employee perspectives.
sessions.attendees: Malti, Tom, Julie and ICC India Employees

sessions.agenda_topic: CFT Family Pizza with Jennifer West
sessions.description: Informal CFT team lunch with Jennifer West, Yau, and RK. Enables open interaction, team connection, and a relaxed discussion with the CFT group.
sessions.attendees: Yau, Jen, RK and CFT team

sessions.description: Coffee session with Yau, Jen, RK, and the CFT team. Designed for informal conversation, local engagement, and team-level exchange.
sessions.attendees: Yau, Jen, RK and CFT team

sessions.agenda_topic: Demo on Enterprise Learning and Connected Ecosystem
sessions.description: Showcase of the enterprise learning and connected data ecosystem capabilities. Demonstrates how learning, knowledge, and data signals can improve visibility and scalable decision-making.
sessions.attendees: Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Amanda, Faizan

sessions.description: Small-group interaction with selected colleagues for open discussion with Gabriele Ricci. Focused on talent stories, leadership access, and candid exchange.
sessions.attendees: Gabriele Ricci, Selected Group of 20 people

sessions.description: Second small-group interaction to extend leadership access to another selected cohort. Creates space for informal Q&A, local talent visibility, and connection.
sessions.attendees: Gabriele Ricci, Selected Group of 20 people

days.day_title: Exploring how ICC India’s capabilities can accelerate the next phase of GCM expansion for IBU
days.day_theme: Deep dive into data and AI capabilities

sessions.description: Reception at ICC India with access support and transition to the Day 2 venue. Prepares all visitors for the ICC capability immersion.
sessions.attendees: All visitors

sessions.description: Introductions, visit objectives, and framing of the strategic opportunity for GCM expansion through ICC capabilities. Aligns leaders on expected outcomes.
sessions.attendees: Tilak, Visiting Leaders, Nara

sessions.description: Guided transition and walkthrough of key ICC innovation areas. Helps visiting leaders experience the collaboration environment and site culture.
sessions.attendees: Esha, Visiting Leaders, Tilak, Nara, RK, Simeon

sessions.agenda_topic: Transforming Market Access Through AI & Automation
sessions.description: Showcase of integrated data, AI, and automation capabilities streamlining Market Access and Pricing operations. Demonstrates scalable business transformation opportunities.
sessions.attendees: Angelaa Kaur, Arpit, Nara, RK, Simeon, Lokho, Madhu, Visiting Leaders

sessions.description: Networking break with transition to the 11th floor and informal immersion into ICC innovation spaces. Provides time for movement and informal discussion.
sessions.attendees: Esha, Visiting Leaders

sessions.agenda_topic: Building Scalable Data Products and Foundations for IBU
sessions.description: Overview of TODAI, I4I, Data Pulse, and MDM as connected insight and data foundation enablers. Shows how these platforms support future-ready business capabilities.
sessions.attendees: Madhu, Siddhalinga, Vimal, Tom, Visiting Leaders

sessions.description: Short movement and refreshment buffer between capability sessions. Keeps the agenda flowing while enabling informal leadership conversations.
sessions.attendees: Visiting Leaders and ICC Hosts

sessions.agenda_topic: Showcasing CEE–Commercial Chapter partnership, CXF platform enablement, and talent readiness to scale CXF globally.
sessions.description: Showcase of CEE–Commercial chapter partnership, CXF platform enablement, and ICC talent readiness. Focuses on how ICC can help scale CXF globally.
sessions.attendees: Nara, Subhajit, JP, Kunal Sen, Jagan, Sumanan Bh, Srijita D, Nitiyasree, Visiting Leaders

sessions.agenda_topic: Leadership Roundtable Lunch with ICC Digital Associates
sessions.description: Interactive networking lunch enabling small-group discussions between IBU leaders and ICC digital talent. Explores innovation culture, career journeys, and workforce models supporting GCM growth.
sessions.attendees: Selected ICC Talent with Visiting Leaders

sessions.description: Transition to the 12th floor and walkthrough of collaboration and innovation spaces. Highlights Udaan Horizon, the Tech Bar, and practical innovation areas across ICC.
sessions.attendees: Esha with Visiting Leaders

sessions.agenda_topic: AI Forward: Scaling Enterprise Productivity Through AI
sessions.description: Showcase of AI-enabled development and engineering capabilities accelerating DD&T productivity. Includes live demonstrations supporting R&D innovation.
sessions.attendees: Madhu, Falguni, Visiting Leaders

sessions.description: Experience tour covering ICC culture and engagement spaces, including the Intangible Bonds Wall and CVG overview. Connects innovation with culture and community.
sessions.attendees: Esha, Pallavi with Visiting Leaders

sessions.description: Short break and transition back to the 11th floor before the enterprise content showcase. Provides a reset before the closing capability sessions.
sessions.attendees: Visiting Leaders and ICC Hosts

sessions.agenda_topic: Showcasing Enterprise Content Innovation Capabilities built in ICC
sessions.description: Showcase of ICC-built enterprise content innovation capabilities and their role in scalable content operations. Covers reuse, speed, quality, and business impact.
sessions.attendees: Rahul Mohan, Tiana Hosmani, Sebastian Lipp, Visiting Leaders

sessions.description: Roundtable with industry and strategic partners on the evolving GCC ecosystem, innovation trends, talent, and future capability centers. Brings external perspective into ICC growth planning.
sessions.attendees: Visiting Leaders + Bharat from Everest Group

sessions.description: Discussion on strategic insights from the immersion experience and opportunities to accelerate the next phase of GCM expansion for IBU. Captures reflections and follow-up priorities.
sessions.attendees: Sanjay, visiting leaders

sessions.description: Coordinated departure from ICC to the dinner venue for visiting leaders and hosts. Ensures smooth movement and timely arrival.
sessions.location: ICC India to Leela Lotus Oriental
sessions.attendees: Visiting Leaders

sessions.description: Leadership dinner to continue informal dialogue and relationship-building after the ICC capability immersion. Focused on reflections, alignment, and next-step opportunities.
sessions.attendees: Visiting Leaders

sessions.agenda_topic: Transit to Accenture Innovation Hub (Bellandur) from Hotel Leela
sessions.description: Travel from Hotel Leela to Accenture Innovation Hub, Bellandur. Destination: Building 14, Pritech Park, Adarsh Palm Retreat, Bellandur, Bengaluru.
sessions.attendees: Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda Lawlor; Aneel will join at Hotel Leela; RK will join directly at Accenture

sessions.description: Opening welcome at Accenture with introductions and visit orientation. Establishes context before the innovation hub sessions begin.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel

sessions.agenda_topic: Platform Led Delivery approach and Demos
sessions.description: Overview of Accenture’s platform-led delivery model with supporting demos. Shows how delivery accelerators support scale, speed, and quality.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel

sessions.agenda_topic: The pressures and how we change the way we work across cost, speed, risk, talent and technology.
sessions.description: Working session on operating pressures across cost, speed, risk, talent, and technology. Focuses on practical ways to evolve delivery and collaboration.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel

sessions.description: Short refreshment pause at Accenture before commitment and readiness discussions. Allows leaders to reset and continue informal conversations.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel

sessions.agenda_topic: What needs to be true – our commitment to each other
sessions.description: Joint alignment discussion on mutual expectations, ways of working, and shared commitments. Clarifies what is needed to make the partnership effective.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel

sessions.agenda_topic: Transition approach and confirming Service Readiness
sessions.description: Review of transition plan, handover approach, dependencies, and service readiness criteria. Ensures teams are aligned before execution.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel

sessions.description: Lunch break at Accenture for visiting leaders and hosts. Provides informal networking space before the afternoon use-case discussion.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel

sessions.description: Discussion of use cases beyond AMS/IMS to identify broader collaboration and innovation opportunities. Explores future-facing business value areas.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel

sessions.description: Recap of key decisions, open items, and next steps from the Accenture visit. Closes the session with aligned follow-ups and ownership.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel

sessions.agenda_topic: Gabriele Ricci and Amanda will be back to ICC
sessions.description: Return movement for Gabriele Ricci and Amanda back to ICC after the Accenture visit. Keeps post-visit movement visible for coordination.
sessions.attendees: RK, Gabriele Ricci, Sanjay, Jen, Yau, Amanda, Aneel
